description: Lock the 2026-06-24 rescope of industrial_ballistics_laboratories to the 1874 Sandy Hook ordnance proving ground and its weapons-testing scope.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to the U.S. National Park Service's 1874 Sandy Hook proving-ground date, not the previous 1884 smokeless-powder placeholder.
The proving-ground scope predates smokeless powder, so smokeless powder is a later test subject rather than a direct prerequisite.
Rifled ordnance was a source-backed reason for the proving ground's establishment.
The source-backed node is a dedicated systematic weapons-testing facility.
